creator: alexis.praga@proton.me
text:
Created attachment 224668
Update dependencies for kitty v0.20.2.

Fully functional version, passing all tests.

Documentation is built by default. Upstream code uses "make" (hardcoded) so I've patched it to use gmake. A pull request has been submitted upstream : https://github.com/kovidgoyal/kitty/pull/3574

Please let me know of any coding style issues. I've used poudriere and portlint.
